evaluators.name: Set Nearest Café Within 5 Miles as Favorite Store Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user logged in as demo.user1 and set their favorite store to the nearest store in ZIP 94103 within 5 miles.

evaluators.name: Create New Customer Account and Access Dashboard Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a new customer account was created with the specified details and that the dashboard for that new account was opened.

evaluators.name: Schedule Medium Latte Pickup Closest to 8:30 AM Tomorrow Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that demo.user2 has a draft order with a medium latte and a pickup time tomorrow between 8:00–9:00 AM set to 8:30.

evaluators.name: Reorder Cheapest Large Drink from Past Orders Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that demo.user3 is logged in and has added the cheapest large drink from their past (non-draft) orders to a new draft order.

evaluators.name: Add New Payment Card and Set as Default Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that demo.user4 added a new Visa card ending in 4242 with the expected details and set it as the default payment method.

evaluators.name: Redeem Bakery Reward Under $5 with 4+ Stars Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that demo.user5 redeemed at least one available bakery reward priced under $5 with rating ≥ 4 stars.

evaluators.name: Update Notification Preferences to SMS Order Updates Only Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that demo.user6 disabled email promotions and all push notifications, and enabled only SMS notifications for order status updates.

evaluators.name: Change Password Using Current Password and Re-Login Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that demo.user7 changed their password from the old value to the new one with an updated timestamp and is currently logged in with that account.
